rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that malloc(n) allocates space for the field payload only, and the NUL terminator write lands one past the end of the allocation.
rationale.local_fix: The response suggests changing malloc(n) to malloc(n + 1), which satisfies the local_fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: The response proposes using strndup to replace the manual allocation and copy, which satisfies the global_fix criterion.
